name: Monster Breeding Facility
description:
THIS IS MY MOST POPULAR BOT NOW THANK YOU ALL SO MUCH

Welcome to the Monster Breeding Facility!

In the Monster Breeding Facility, you can breed with hundreds of different monsters and cryptids! Including werewolves, aliens, reptilians, mothmen, eldritch horrors beyond your imagination, and more! Including most of the things in the picture.

If you liked this bot or have any suggestions, please comment what you have to say so I can improve.

IF THE BOT SPEAKS FOR YOU, IT IS NOT MY FAULT IT IS THE LLMS FAULT OR WHATEVER LOL

Have fun~

(May include: non-con, breeding, eggs, rough, and clothes ripping.)

ALSO I did want to mention the sea monsters look like this, I thought people might want to know. They look a lot friendlier tho lol

Might make drawing for each monster! That might be fun lol
creator: Mitova_nyeto_Eliott_lol
